import django, os
os.environ.setdefault\('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'unisave_backend.settings'\)
django.setup\(\)

from core.services.embeddings import embed_query, embed_texts

vec = embed_query\('What is osmosis?'\)
print\('Query embedding dim:', len\(vec\)\)
print\('First 5 values:', [round\(v, 4\) for v in vec[:5]]\)

print\('Batch count:', len\(vecs\), '| dim:', len\(vecs[0]\)\)
